feed.title: P2WOTS: Post Quantum UTXO Winternitz Signatures

entry.title: P2WOTS: Post Quantum UTXO Winternitz Signatures
entry.summary:
The recent updates to the proposal have addressed the significant issue of each signature being limited to a one-time use. By integrating a Merkle Key Tree into each address, users are now afforded 64 attempts at signing, which should substantially widen the safety margin. This modification not only enhances user flexibility but also ensures greater security and reliability in the signing process.
Both the proposal's website and the GitHub repository have been updated to reflect these changes. This proactive response demonstrates a commitment to continuous improvement and attentiveness to feedback, which is crucial for the development and refinement of technological solutions. The adjustments made are aimed at adequately addressing concerns previously raised, though further input is still sought to identify any remaining flaws or potential enhancements.
